response.overview: The NOA 5th Anniversary Special Live “LiGHTS” at Yokohama BUNTAI on September 13, 2025, a five-year debut celebration with a "Light and Darkness" theme featuring twenty-eight dancers, guest appearances by Ayumu Imazu plus tofubeats, including surprise performances of "Just Say It" with the unreleased track "WE ALL READY."
response.title: NOA 5th Anniversary Special Live “LiGHTS”
